description: In-game player telemetry from Postgres: combat/events, movement, status snapshots, round stats. Rows sorted by game or engine-reported time.

options.content:
### In-game player data (Postgres)
Each panel is a **table**. The **first column is time** (server log time where available, else ingest fallback).
- **Game events** — kills, damage, chat, rounds, etc. from parsed logs.
- **Movement** — only if the server prints `BIOBASE_POS_JSON` lines.
- **Player status** — per-player fields from each RCON `status` poll (`status_poll_time` is when that snapshot was taken).
- **Round stats** — CS2 JSON round blocks; time is the `JSON_BEGIN` log line.

panels.description: Parsed server log events (game time = engine log prefix on the line).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT event_ts AS game_time,
       event_type,
       round_num,
       attacker_name,
       attacker_steamid,
       attacker_team,
       victim_name,
       victim_steamid,
       victim_team,
       weapon,
       headshot,
       extra_json
FROM   public.biobase_cs2_game_event
ORDER BY event_ts DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Game events (players & combat)

panels.description: Position / velocity samples from BIOBASE_POS_JSON log lines only.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(event_ts, sampled_at) AS game_time,
       tick,
       player_name,
       steamid,
       pos_x,
       pos_y,
       pos_z,
       vel_x,
       vel_y,
       vel_z,
       speed,
       yaw,
       pitch,
       on_ground,
       extra_json
FROM   public.biobase_cs2_movement_sample
ORDER BY COALESCE(event_ts, sampled_at) DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Movement (coordinates & velocity)

panels.description: One row per player per RCON status poll. Time = when that poll ran.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT sampled_at AS status_poll_time,
       player_name,
       steamid,
       userid,
       connected,
       ping,
       loss,
       state
FROM   public.biobase_cs2_player_snapshot
ORDER BY sampled_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Player status (from RCON /status)

panels.description: Per-player cumulative stats when CS2 emits JSON_BEGIN … JSON_END round_stats.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(event_ts, recorded_at) AS game_time,
       round_number,
       map,
       score_t,
       score_ct,
       slot_index,
       accountid,
       team,
       money,
       kills,
       deaths,
       assists,
       dmg,
       hsp,
       kdr,
       adr,
       mvp,
       ef,
       ud,
       kills_3k,
       kills_4k,
       kills_5k,
       clutchk,
       firstk,
       pistolk,
       sniperk,
       blindk,
       bombk,
       firedmg,
       uniquek,
       dinks,
       chickenk
FROM   public.biobase_cs2_round_stats
ORDER BY COALESCE(event_ts, recorded_at) DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Round stats (per player)

title: In-game player data
